",
            "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.f_offramp_payment_rd()
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN
  RETURN (
    SELECT jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(result))
    FROM (
      SELECT
      	ofr.id AS "offRampId",
        CASE
          WHEN bl."acronym" = 'BHD' THEN
            SUBSTRING(fa."accountNumber" FROM 1 FOR 7) || '-' ||
            SUBSTRING(fa."accountNumber" FROM 8 FOR 3) || '-' ||
            SUBSTRING(fa."accountNumber" FROM 11 FOR 1)
          ELSE fa."accountNumber"
        END AS no_cuenta,
        bl."acronym" AS codigo_banco,
        CASE
          WHEN fa."accountType"::fiat_account_accounttype_enum = 'CORRIENTE'::fiat_account_accounttype_enum THEN 'CC'
          ELSE 'CA'
        END AS tipo_cuenta,
        INITCAP(LOWER(ic."firstName" || ' ' || ic."lastName")) AS nombre_cliente,
        'D' AS tipo_movimiento,
        q."toAmount"::NUMERIC AS valor_transaccion,
        '' AS referencia_transaccion,
        'Pago alfredPay' AS descripcion_transaccion,
        LOWER(c.email) AS email_beneficiario,
        CASE
          WHEN ic."typeDocument" = 'National ID' THEN 'P'
          ELSE 'C'
        END AS tipo_identificacion,
        ic.dni AS numero_identificacion,
        'PENDING' AS status_report,
        CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS date_trasaction,
        uuid_generate_v4() AS transacctionId
      FROM off_ramps ofr
      INNER JOIN public.quote q ON ofr.quote = q.id
      INNER JOIN customer c ON ofr.customer = c.id
      INNER JOIN individual_customers ic ON ic."customerId" = c.id
      INNER JOIN fiat_account fa ON ofr."fiatAccount" = fa.id
      INNER JOIN bank_list bl ON bl.name = fa.name
      WHERE q."toCurrency" = 'DOP'
      AND ofr.status = 'ON_CHAIN_DEPOSIT_RECEIVED'
      AND ofr."txHash" IS NOT NULL
      AND ofr."IdTransaction" IS NULL
      --AND ofr."createdAt"::DATE = CURRENT_DATE
    ) AS result
  );
END;

",
            "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.f_valid_local_balance_by_customer_and_business(customer_id uuid, p_businessid numeric)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    is_local_balance BOOLEAN;
    p_customer_country VARCHAR(3);
    response JSONB;
BEGIN
    -- Intentar obtener el balance local
  SELECT COALESCE(ic.country, bc."countryCode")
  INTO p_customer_country
    FROM business b
    INNER JOIN customer c ON b.id = c.business
    LEFT JOIN individual_customers ic ON ic."customerId" = c.id
    LEFT JOIN business_customers bc ON bc."customerId" = c.id
  WHERE c.id = customer_id AND b.id = p_businessId;
    -- Si no se encuentra un registro, retornamos un error en JSONB
    IF NOT FOUND THEN
        RETURN jsonb_build_object(
            'status', 'error',
          	'statusCodeHttp', 404,
            'message', 'Customer not found',
          	'errorCode', 111415,
            'data', NULL
        );
    END IF;
    
    SELECT 
      CASE 
          WHEN count(*) = 1 THEN true
          ELSE false
      END AS isLocalBalancer 
    INTO is_local_balance
    FROM (
        SELECT jsonb_array_elements(config.value::jsonb->'country') AS country_data
        FROM configurations config
        WHERE config.field = 'LOCAL_BALACE_BUSINESS_'||p_businessId
    ) subquery
    WHERE country_data->>'name' = p_customer_country
    AND (country_data->'status')::boolean = true;

    -- Si el cliente no tiene balance local, retornamos otro mensaje
    IF is_local_balance = FALSE THEN
        RETURN jsonb_build_object(
            'status', 'error',
          	'statusCodeHttp', 404,
            'message', 'Customer not local balance',
          	'errorCode', 111569,
            'data', NULL
        );
    END IF;

    -- Si todo está bien, devolvemos el resultado exitoso
    RETURN jsonb_build_object(
        'status', 'success',
        'statusCodeHttp', 200,
        'message', 'Customer has local balance',
        'data', jsonb_build_object('customer_id', customer_id, 'islocalbalance', is_local_balance, 'country', p_customer_country)
    );
END;

",
            "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.f_valid_local_balance_by_customer_and_business(customer_id uuid, p_businessid numeric, country character varying)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    is_local_balance BOOLEAN;
    p_customer_country VARCHAR(3);
    response JSONB;
BEGIN
    -- Intentar obtener el balance local
    SELECT COALESCE(ic.country, bc."countryCode")
    INTO p_customer_country
      FROM business b
      INNER JOIN customer c ON b.id = c.business
      LEFT JOIN individual_customers ic ON ic."customerId" = c.id
      LEFT JOIN business_customers bc ON bc."customerId" = c.id
    WHERE c.id = customer_id AND b.id = p_businessId;

    -- Si no se encuentra un registro, retornamos un error en JSONB
    IF NOT FOUND THEN
        RETURN jsonb_build_object(
            'status', 'error',
          	'statusCodeHttp', 404,
            'message', 'Customer not found',
          	'errorCode', 111415,
            'data', NULL
        );
    END IF;
    
    
    SELECT 
      CASE 
          WHEN COUNT(*) = 1 THEN true
          ELSE false
      END AS isLocalBalancer
    INTO is_local_balance
    FROM configurations config,
         jsonb_array_elements(config.value::jsonb->'country') AS elem
		WHERE config.field = 'LOCAL_BALACE_BUSINESS_'||p_businessId
      AND elem->>'name' = UPPER(country)
      AND (elem->>'status') = 'true';

    -- Si el cliente no tiene balance local, retornamos otro mensaje
    IF NOT FOUND THEN
        RETURN jsonb_build_object(
            'status', 'error',
          	'statusCodeHttp', 404,
            'message', 'Customer not VirtualAccount',
          	'errorCode', 111569,
            'data', NULL
        );
    END IF;

    -- Si todo está bien, devolvemos el resultado exitoso
    RETURN jsonb_build_object(
        'status', 'success',
        'statusCodeHttp', 200,
        'message', 'Customer has local balance',
        'data', jsonb_build_object(
          'customer_id', customer_id, 
          'islocalbalance', is_local_balance
        )
    );
END;

",
            "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.find_offramp_by_bussines(p_status character varying, p_chain character varying, p_business character varying)
 RETURNS jsonb[]
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE 
    c_paymentPending jsonb;
    c_result jsonb[] := '{}';
BEGIN
    FOR c_paymentPending IN 
        SELECT jsonb_build_object(
            'id', o.id,
            'chain', q."chain",
			'memo', o."memo",
			'fromAmount', q."fromAmount",
			'address', o."originAddress"
        )
	    from 
	off_ramps o
inner join 
	customer c on c.id = o.customer
inner join
	"quote" q on q.id = o."quote"
where
	o."createdAt"::date >= current_date - 1
	and c.business = p_business::numeric
	and o."paymentId" is null
	and o."status" =  p_status::off_ramps_status_enum
	and q."chain" = p_chain::quote_chain_enum 
	    ORDER BY 
	     	o."createdAt" ASC
	    LIMIT 100
    LOOP
        c_result := array_append(c_result, c_paymentPending);
    END LOOP;
   
    RETURN c_result;
END;

",
            "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.find_offramp_by_bussines_and_chain_array(p_status character varying, p_chain quote_chain_enum[], p_business character varying[])
 RETURNS jsonb[]
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE 
    c_paymentPending jsonb;
    c_result jsonb[] := '{}';
BEGIN
    FOR c_paymentPending IN 
        SELECT jsonb_build_object(
            'id', o.id,
            'chain', q."chain",
            'memo', o."memo",
            'fromAmount', q."fromAmount",
            'address', o."originAddress",
			'formCurrency', q."fromCurrency",
			'toCurrency', q."toCurrency",
			'paymentMethodType', q."paymentMethodType",
			'bankCode', fa.metadata::jsonb ->> 'bankCode',
			'nationalIdentificationNumber', fa.metadata::jsonb ->> 'nationalIdentificationNumber',
			'metadata', jsonb_build_object(
				'amount', q."toAmount",
				'recipientType', fa.metadata::jsonb ->> 'typeCustomer',
				'senderCountry', c."type",
				'chain', q."chain",
				'paymentMethodType', q."paymentMethodType",
				'bankCode', fa.metadata::jsonb ->> 'bankCode',
				'formCurrency', q."fromCurrency",
				'nationalIdentificationNumber', fa.metadata::jsonb ->> 'nationalIdentificationNumber',
				'toCurrency', q."toCurrency",
	            'originator', jsonb_build_object(
	                'name', COALESCE(ic."firstName" || ' ' || ic."lastName", bc."legalName"),
	                'address', jsonb_build_object(
	                    'street', COALESCE(ic."address", bc."addressStreetOne"),
	                    'city', COALESCE(ic."city", bc."addressCity"),
	                    'country', COALESCE(ic."country", bc."countryCode"),
	                    'stateProvince', COALESCE(ic."state", bc."stateCode"),
	                    'postalCode', COALESCE(ic."zipCode", bc."addressZipCode")
	                ),
	                'financial', jsonb_build_object(
	                    'name', 'CELLPAY SAPI DE CV',
	                    'address', jsonb_build_object(
	                        'street', 'Av de Parque Oriente #1035',
	                        'city', 'CIUDAD DE MEXICO',
	                        'country', 'MX'
	                    )
	                )
	            ),
	            'beneficiaryAccountData', jsonb_build_object(
	                'swiftCode', fa.metadata::jsonb ->> 'swiftCode',
	                'bankName', fa."accountName",
	                'country', fa.metadata::jsonb ->> 'bankCountry',
	                'accountNumber', fa."accountNumber",
	                'recipientLegalName',fa.metadata::jsonb ->> 'accountHolderName'),
	            'beneficiary', jsonb_build_object(
	                'name', fa.metadata::jsonb ->> 'accountHolderName',
	                'address', jsonb_build_object(
	                    'street', fa.metadata::jsonb ->> 'bankStreet',
	                    'city', fa.metadata::jsonb ->> 'bankCity',
	                    'country', fa.metadata::jsonb ->> 'bankCountry',
						'stateProvince', fa.metadata::jsonb ->> 'stateProvince',
	                    'postalCode', fa.metadata::jsonb ->> 'postalCode'
	                ),
	                'accountNumber',c.id
	            ),
				'customerId', c.id,
				'sendMoneyTransactionId', o.metadata::jsonb ->> 'sendMoneyTransactionId',
				'routingNumber', COALESCE(fa.metadata::jsonb ->> 'networkIdentifier', fa."networkIdentifier"),
				'id', o.id
        	)
        )
        FROM off_ramps o
        INNER JOIN customer c ON c.id = o.customer
        INNER JOIN "quote" q ON q.id = o."quote"
		INNER JOIN fiat_account fa ON fa.id = o."fiatAccount"
        LEFT JOIN individual_customers ic ON ic."customerId" = o.customer
        LEFT JOIN business_customers bc ON bc."customerId" = o.customer
        WHERE 
			  o."createdAt"::timestamp >= current_timestamp - interval '6 hours'
--			  o."createdAt"::timestamp >= current_timestamp - interval '30 hours'
          AND c.business::text = ANY(p_business)
          AND o."paymentId" IS NULL
		  AND o."IdCoelsa" IS NULL
          AND o."status" = p_status::off_ramps_status_enum
          AND q."chain" = ANY(p_chain)
        ORDER BY o."createdAt" ASC
        LIMIT 100
    LOOP
        c_result := array_append(c_result, c_paymentPending);
    END LOOP;
   
    RETURN c_result;
END;

",
            "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.find_offramps_beneficiary_info(p_business_id integer)
 RETURNS jsonb[]
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    c_row jsonb;
    c_result jsonb[] := '{}';
BEGIN
    FOR c_row IN
        SELECT jsonb_build_object(
            'originator', jsonb_build_object(
                'name', COALESCE(ic."firstName" || ' ' || ic."lastName", bc."legalName"),
                'address', jsonb_build_object(
                    'street', COALESCE(ic."address", bc."addressStreetOne"),
                    'city', COALESCE(ic."city", bc."addressCity"),
                    'country', COALESCE(ic."country", bc."countryCode"),
                    'stateProvince', COALESCE(ic."state", bc."stateCode"),
                    'postalCode', COALESCE(ic."zipCode", bc."addressZipCode")
                ),
                'financial', jsonb_build_object(
                    'name', 'CELLPAY SAPI DE CV',
                    'address', jsonb_build_object(
                        'street', 'Av de Parque Oriente #1035',
                        'city', 'CIUDAD DE MEXICO',
                        'country', 'MX'
                    )
                )
            ),
            'beneficiaryAccountData', jsonb_build_object(
                'swiftCode', fa.metadata::jsonb ->> 'swiftCode',
                'bankName', fa."accountName",
                'country', fa.metadata::jsonb ->> 'bankCountry',
                'accountNumber', fa."accountNumber",
                'recipientLegalName',fa.metadata::jsonb ->> 'accountHolderName'),
            'beneficiary', jsonb_build_object(
                'name', fa.metadata::jsonb ->> 'accountHolderName',
                'address', jsonb_build_object(
                    'street', fa.metadata::jsonb ->> 'bankStreet',
                    'city', fa.metadata::jsonb ->> 'bankCity',
                    'country', fa.metadata::jsonb ->> 'bankCountry'
                ),
                'accountNumber',c.id
            ),
			'customerId', c.id,
			'sendMoneyTransactionId', o.metadata::jsonb ->> 'sendMoneyTransactionId',
			'routingNumber', COALESCE(fa.metadata::jsonb ->> 'networkIdentifier', fa."networkIdentifier"),
			'id', o.id
        )
        FROM off_ramps o
        INNER JOIN fiat_account fa ON fa.id = o."fiatAccount"
        INNER JOIN customer c ON c.id = o.customer
        LEFT JOIN individual_customers ic ON ic."customerId" = o.customer
        LEFT JOIN business_customers bc ON bc."customerId" = o.customer
        WHERE 
			c.business = p_business_id
			AND o.status = 'CREATED'
			AND o."paymentId" is null 
			AND o.metadata::jsonb ? 'sendMoneyTransactionId'
--			and o.id = '9352b555-f4cf-4226-b442-518454e12244'
		order by o."createdAt" asc
		limit 100
    LOOP
        c_result := array_append(c_result, c_row);
    END LOOP;

    RETURN c_result;
END;

",
            "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.find_offramps_by_status(p_status character varying, p_country character varying)
 RETURNS jsonb[]
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE 
    c_paymentPending jsonb;
    c_result jsonb[] := '{}';
BEGIN
    FOR c_paymentPending IN 
        SELECT jsonb_build_object(
            'id', or2.id,
            'status', or2."status",
            'city',
            CASE 
                WHEN fa."isExternal" = true
                     AND fa.metadata::jsonb ? 'bankCity'
                THEN fa.metadata::jsonb ->> 'bankCity'
                ELSE COALESCE(ic."city", bc."addressCity")
            END,
            'address',
            CASE 
                WHEN fa."isExternal" = true
                     AND fa.metadata::jsonb ? 'bankAddress'
                THEN fa.metadata::jsonb ->> 'bankAddress'
                ELSE COALESCE(ic."address", bc."addressStreetOne")
            END,
            'phone',
            CASE 
                WHEN fa."isExternal" = true
                     AND fa.metadata::jsonb ? 'phoneNumber'
                THEN fa.metadata::jsonb ->> 'phoneNumber'
                ELSE COALESCE(ic."phoneNumber", bc."phoneNumber")
            END,
            'createdAt', or2."createdAt",
            'expiration', or2."expiration",
            'memo', or2."memo",
            'customer', or2."customer",
            'businessId', c."business",
            'accountNumber', fa."accountNumber",
            'accountBankName', COALESCE(fa."name", fa."accountName"),
			'IdTransaction', or2."IdTransaction" ,
            'accountBankType', fa."accountType",
			'isSendMoney',COALESCE(or2.metadata::jsonb ? 'sendMoneyTransactionId', false),
            'typeDocument',
            CASE 
                WHEN fa."isExternal" = true
                     AND fa.metadata::jsonb ? 'documentType'
                THEN CASE fa.metadata::jsonb ->> 'documentType'::TEXT
					WHEN 'DNI' THEN '1'
                    WHEN 'PASAPORTE' THEN '3'
                    ELSE COALESCE(fa.metadata::jsonb ->> 'documentType'::TEXT, 'NIT')
				END
                ELSE CASE ic."typeDocumentCol"::TEXT
                    WHEN 'DNI' THEN '1'
                    WHEN 'PASAPORTE' THEN '3'
                    ELSE COALESCE(ic."typeDocumentCol"::TEXT, 'NIT')
                END
            END,
            'accountBankCode', fa."bankCode",
            'amountCrypto', q."fromAmount",
            'amountFiat', q."toAmount",
            'firsName',
            CASE 
                WHEN fa."isExternal" = true
                     AND fa.metadata::jsonb ? 'accountHolderName'
                THEN fa.metadata::jsonb ->> 'accountHolderName'
                ELSE COALESCE(
                     NULLIF(ic."firstName", ''),
                    name_parts.part1 || ' ' || name_parts.part2
                )
            END,
            'lastName',
            CASE 
                WHEN fa."isExternal" = true
                THEN COALESCE(fa.metadata::jsonb ->> 'accountHolderLastName', null)
                ELSE COALESCE(
                     NULLIF(ic."lastName", ''),
                    name_parts.part3 || ' ' || name_parts.part4
                )
            END,
            'dni',
            CASE 
                WHEN fa."isExternal" = true
                     AND fa.metadata::jsonb ? 'documentNumber'
                THEN fa.metadata::jsonb ->> 'documentNumber'
                ELSE COALESCE(
                    ic."dni",
                    REGEXP_REPLACE(bc."taxId", '\D', '', 'g')
                )
            END,
            'email',
            CASE 
                WHEN fa."isExternal" = true
                     AND fa.metadata::jsonb ? 'email'
                THEN fa.metadata::jsonb ->> 'email'
                ELSE c.email
            END
        )
        FROM 
            off_ramps or2
        LEFT JOIN fiat_account fa ON or2."fiatAccount" = fa.id
        LEFT JOIN quote q ON or2."quote" = q.id
        LEFT JOIN individual_customers ic ON ic."customerId" = or2.customer
        LEFT JOIN business_customers bc ON bc."customerId" = or2.customer
        LEFT JOIN customer c ON c.id = or2."customer"
        LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
            SELECT 
                split[1] AS part1,
                split[2] AS part2,
                split[3] AS part3,
                split[4] AS part4
            FROM (
                SELECT regexp_split_to_array(bc."legalName", '\s+') AS split
            ) AS t
        ) name_parts ON TRUE
        WHERE 
            or2.status = p_status::off_ramps_status_enum
            AND q."toCurrency"::varchar = p_country
			AND or2."createdAt"::date >= current_date - 30
			AND or2."txHash" is not null
			and or2.metadata::jsonb ->> 'sendMoneyTransactionId' IS NULL
--			AND or2.id IN ('4dbc5693-4bb8-4137-ac0b-db49ab71739f')
        ORDER BY or2."createdAt" ASC
        LIMIT 100
    LOOP
        c_result := array_append(c_result, c_paymentPending);
    END LOOP;

    RETURN c_result;
END;
$function$
",
            "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.find_offramps_by_webhook_eth(p_status character varying, p_address character varying, p_amount character varying, p_token character varying)
 RETURNS jsonb[]
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE 
    c_paymentPending jsonb;
    c_result jsonb[] := '{}';
BEGIN
    FOR c_paymentPending IN 
        SELECT jsonb_build_object(
            'id', or2.id,
            'status', or2."status",
            'createdAt', or2."createdAt",
            'expiration', or2."expiration",
            'customer', or2."customer",
            'accountNumber', fa."accountNumber",
            'accountBankCode', fa."bankCode",
            'amountCrypto', q."fromAmount",
            'amountFiat', q."toAmount",
            'firsName', ic."firstName",
            'dni', ic."dni",
            'IdTransaction', or2."IdTransaction"
        )
        FROM 
            off_ramps or2
        LEFT JOIN  
            fiat_account fa ON or2."fiatAccount" = fa.id  
        LEFT JOIN  
            "quote" q on or2."quote" = q.id
        LEFT JOIN  
            individual_customers ic on ic."customerId" = or2.customer 
        WHERE 
            or2.status = p_status::off_ramps_status_enum
			AND q."fromCurrency" = p_token
            AND trunc(q."fromAmount"::numeric, 2)::varchar = trunc(p_amount::numeric, 2)::varchar
            AND lower(or2."depositAddress") = lower(p_address)
            AND or2."createdAt"::timestamp >= current_timestamp - interval '1 hours'
        ORDER BY 
            or2."createdAt" ASC
        LIMIT 1
    LOOP
        c_result := array_append(c_result, c_paymentPending);
    END LOOP;
   
    RETURN c_result;
END;
$function$
",
            "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.find_offramps_by_webhook_fireblocks(p_status character varying, p_address character varying, p_amount character varying, p_memo character varying)
 RETURNS jsonb[]
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE 
    c_paymentPending jsonb;
    c_result jsonb[] := '{}';
BEGIN
    FOR c_paymentPending IN 
        SELECT jsonb_build_object(
            'id', or2.id,
            'status', or2."status",
            'createdAt', or2."createdAt",
            'expiration', or2."expiration",
            'memo', or2."memo",
            'customer', or2."customer",
            'accountNumber', fa."accountNumber",
            'accountBankCode', fa."bankCode",
            'amountCrypto', q."fromAmount",
            'amountFiat', q."toAmount",
			'fromCurrency', q."fromCurrency",
			'toCurrency', q."toCurrency",
			'chain', q."chain",
            'firsName', ic."firstName",
            'dni', ic."dni",
            'IdTransaction', or2."IdTransaction",
			'isSendMoney',COALESCE(or2.metadata::jsonb ? 'sendMoneyTransactionId', false)
        )
        FROM 
            off_ramps or2
        LEFT JOIN  
            fiat_account fa ON or2."fiatAccount" = fa.id  
        LEFT JOIN  
            "quote" q on or2."quote" = q.id
        LEFT JOIN  
            individual_customers ic on ic."customerId" = or2.customer 
        WHERE 
            or2.status = p_status::off_ramps_status_enum
            AND trunc(q."fromAmount"::numeric, 2)::varchar = trunc(p_amount::numeric, 2)::varchar
            AND (p_memo IS NULL AND or2.memo IS NULL OR p_memo IS NOT NULL AND or2.memo = p_memo)
            AND lower(or2."originAddress") = lower(p_address)
            AND or2."createdAt"::timestamp >= current_timestamp - interval '24 hours'
        ORDER BY 
            or2."createdAt" ASC
        LIMIT 1
    LOOP
        c_result := array_append(c_result, c_paymentPending);
    END LOOP;
   
    RETURN c_result;
END;

",
            "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.find_onramp_by_clabe(p_clabe character varying, p_status character varying, p_amount character varying DEFAULT NULL::character varying)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    result JSONB;
BEGIN
    -- Intentar encontrar un registro con monto específico
    IF p_amount IS NOT NULL THEN
        SELECT jsonb_build_object(
            'id', o.id,
            'status', o.status,
            'amount', o.amount,
            'createdAt', o."createdAt",
            'clabe', fpi.clabe,
			'isSendMoney',COALESCE(o.metadata::jsonb ? 'sendMoneyTransactionId', false),
            'quote', jsonb_build_object(
                'createdAt', q."createdAt",
                'expiration', q."expiration",
                'fromCurrency', q."fromCurrency",
                'toCurrency', q."toCurrency",
                'paymentMethodType', q."paymentMethodType",
                'fromAmount', q."fromAmount",
				'toAmount', q."toAmount",
                'chain', q."chain"
            ),
            'customer', CASE
                WHEN c.type = 'INDIVIDUAL' THEN
                    jsonb_build_object(
                        'dni', ic.dni,
						'customerName', concat(ic."firstName", ' ', ic."lastName"),
                        'businessId', jsonb_build_object(
                            'id', b.id
                        )
                    )
                ELSE
                    jsonb_build_object(
                        'dni', bc."taxId",
						'customerName', bc."legalName",
                        'businessId', jsonb_build_object(
                            'id', b.id
                        )
                    )
            END
        )
        INTO result
        FROM on_ramps o
        INNER JOIN fiat_payment_instructions fpi ON fpi.id = o."fiatPaymentInstructionsId"
        INNER JOIN quote q ON q.id = o."quote"
		INNER JOIN customer c ON c.id = o.customer
		INNER JOIN business b on b.id = c.business
        LEFT JOIN individual_customers ic ON c.id = ic."customerId"
        LEFT JOIN business_customers bc ON c.id = bc."customerId"
        WHERE o.status = p_status::on_ramps_status_enum
          AND fpi.clabe = p_clabe
          AND o."createdAt" >= current_date - INTERVAL '1 days'
          AND o.amount = p_amount
        ORDER BY o."createdAt" DESC
        LIMIT 1;
    END IF;

    -- Si no encontró resultado con monto, buscar solo por status y clabe
    IF result IS NULL THEN
        SELECT jsonb_build_object(
            'id', o.id,
            'status', o.status,
            'amount', o.amount,
            'createdAt', o."createdAt",
            'clabe', fpi.clabe,
            'customer', o.customer,
			'isSendMoney',COALESCE(o.metadata::jsonb ? 'sendMoneyTransactionId', false),
            'quote', jsonb_build_object(
                'createdAt', q."createdAt",
                'expiration', q."expiration",
                'fromCurrency', q."fromCurrency",
                'toCurrency', q."toCurrency",
                'paymentMethodType', q."paymentMethodType",
                'fromAmount', q."fromAmount",
				'toAmount', q."toAmount",
                'chain', q."chain"
            ),
			'customer', CASE
                WHEN c.type = 'INDIVIDUAL' THEN
                    jsonb_build_object(
                        'dni', ic.dni,
						'customerName', concat(ic."firstName", ' ', ic."lastName"),
                        'businessId', jsonb_build_object(
                            'id', b.id
                        )
                    )
                ELSE
                    jsonb_build_object(
                        'dni', bc."taxId",
						'customerName', bc."legalName",
                        'businessId', jsonb_build_object(
                            'id', b.id
                        )
                    )
            END
        )
        INTO result
        FROM on_ramps o
        INNER JOIN fiat_payment_instructions fpi ON fpi.id = o."fiatPaymentInstructionsId"
        INNER JOIN quote q ON q.id = o."quote"
		INNER JOIN customer c ON c.id = o.customer
		INNER JOIN business b on b.id = c.business
        LEFT JOIN individual_customers ic ON c.id = ic."customerId"
        LEFT JOIN business_customers bc ON c.id = bc."customerId"
        WHERE o.status = p_status::on_ramps_status_enum
          AND fpi.clabe = p_clabe
          AND o."createdAt" >= current_date - INTERVAL '2 days'
        ORDER BY o."createdAt" DESC
        LIMIT 1;
    END IF;

    RETURN result;
END;

",
            "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.find_onramp_by_cuit(p_status character varying, p_cuit character varying, p_amount character varying, p_fecha character varying)
 RETURNS jsonb[]
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE 
    c_paymentPending jsonb;
    c_result jsonb[] := '{}';
BEGIN
    -- Primera consulta: Buscar por p_status, p_cuit y p_amount
    FOR c_paymentPending IN 
        SELECT jsonb_build_object(
            'id', or2.id,
            'txHash', or2."txHash",
            'address', or2."depositAddress",
            'toAmount', q."toAmount",
            'fromAmount', q."fromAmount",
            'chain', q."chain",
            'contador', or2."totalSend",
            'reference', or2."PaymentId",
            'createdAt', or2."createdAt",
            'customerId', or2."customer"
        )
        FROM 
           on_ramps or2 
        INNER JOIN 
            "quote" q ON or2."quote" = q.id
        INNER JOIN
            individual_customers ic on or2.customer = ic."customerId"
        WHERE 
            or2.status IN (p_status::on_ramps_status_enum)
            AND ic.country = 'AR'
            AND ic.dni = p_cuit
            AND trunc(q."fromAmount"::numeric, 2)::text =  p_amount::text
            AND or2."createdAt"::date >= current_date - 1
        ORDER BY 
            or2."fiatPaymentInstructionsId" ASC
    LOOP
        c_result := array_append(c_result, c_paymentPending);
    END LOOP;

    -- Si se encontró al menos un resultado, retornarlo
    IF array_length(c_result, 1) > 0 THEN
        RETURN c_result;
    END IF;

    -- Segunda consulta: Buscar solo por p_status y p_cuit
    FOR c_paymentPending IN 
        SELECT jsonb_build_object(
            'customerId', or2."customer"
        )
        FROM 
           on_ramps or2
        INNER JOIN
            individual_customers ic on or2.customer = ic."customerId"
        WHERE 
            or2.status IN (p_status::on_ramps_status_enum)
            AND ic.country = 'AR'
            AND ic.dni = p_cuit
        ORDER BY 
            or2."fiatPaymentInstructionsId" ASC
    LOOP
        c_result := array_append(c_result, c_paymentPending);
    END LOOP;

    -- Si se encontró al menos un resultado en la segunda consulta, retornarlo
    IF array_length(c_result, 1) > 0 THEN
        RETURN c_result;
    END IF;

    -- Si no se encontró ningún resultado, retornar vacío
    RETURN '{}';
END;

",
            "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.find_onramp_by_cuit_kyc_kyb(p_status character varying, p_cuit character varying, p_amount character varying)
 RETURNS jsonb[]

    c_payment jsonb;

    -- Primera búsqueda: filtrando por monto
    FOR c_payment IN

        LEFT JOIN business_customers bc ON bc."customerId" = or2.customer
        WHERE or2.status IN (p_status::on_ramps_status_enum)
          AND COALESCE(ic."country", bc."countryCode", '') = 'AR'

          AND trunc(q."fromAmount"::numeric, 2)::text = trunc(p_amount::numeric, 2)::text
        ORDER BY or2."fiatPaymentInstructionsId" ASC
        LIMIT 1
    LOOP
        c_result := array_append(c_result, c_payment);
    END LOOP;

    -- Si no encontró resultados, busca nuevamente sin filtrar por monto
    IF array_length(c_result, 1) IS NULL THEN
        FOR c_payment IN
            SELECT jsonb_build_object(
                'id', or2.id,
                'txHash', or2."txHash",
                'address', or2."depositAddress",
                'toAmount', q."toAmount",
                'fromAmount', q."fromAmount",
                'chain', q."chain",
                'contador', or2."totalSend",
                'reference', or2."PaymentId",

                'customerId', or2.customer,

            )
            FROM on_ramps or2
            INNER JOIN "quote" q ON or2."quote" = q.id
            LEFT JOIN individual_customers ic ON ic."customerId" = or2.customer
            LEFT JOIN business_customers bc ON bc."customerId" = or2.customer
            WHERE or2.status IN (p_status::on_ramps_status_enum)
              AND COALESCE(ic."country", bc."countryCode", '') = 'AR'
              AND ((ic.dni IS NOT NULL AND ic.dni = p_cuit) OR (bc."taxId" IS NOT NULL AND bc."taxId" = p_cuit))
            ORDER BY or2."fiatPaymentInstructionsId" ASC
            LIMIT 1
        LOOP
            c_result := array_append(c_result, c_payment);
        END LOOP;
    END IF;

    RETURN c_result;

            "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.fn_get_account_validation(p_account character varying, p_country character varying, p_provider_name character varying)
 RETURNS jsonb
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    result JSONB;
BEGIN
    SELECT response
    INTO result
    FROM account_validation_cache
    WHERE country_code = p_country
      AND (
            account_number = p_account
         OR account_alias = p_account
      )
      AND provider_name = p_provider_name
      AND active IS DISTINCT FROM FALSE   -- acepta NULL o TRUE
    LIMIT 1;

    RETURN result;
END;

 RETURNS text
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN
    INSERT INTO account_validation_cache (
        account_number,
        account_alias,
        response,
        provider_name,
        country_code,
        active,
        created_at,
        updated_at
    ) VALUES (
        p_account_number,
        p_account_alias,
        p_response,
        p_provider_name,
        p_country_code,
        p_active,
        NOW(),
        NOW()
    );

    RETURN 'OK';

",
            "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_customer_off_ramps_sums(customer_id uuid)
 RETURNS TABLE(daily_sum numeric, monthly_sum numeric)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN
    RETURN QUERY
    select sum(
		case
			when off_ramps."createdAt"::date = current_date  then q."fromAmount"::numeric
			else 0::numeric 
		end
		
		)as "daily_sum",
		sum(q."fromAmount"::numeric) as "monthly_sum"
	from off_ramps 
	left join "quote" q  on  off_ramps."quote" = q.id
	WHERE off_ramps.status = 'FIAT_TRANSFER_COMPLETED'
	and to_char(off_ramps."createdAt", 'YYYY-MM') = to_char(current_date, 'YYYY-MM')
	AND off_ramps.customer = customer_id
	group by off_ramps.customer;
	END;

",
            "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_customer_onramp_sums(customer_id uuid)
 RETURNS TABLE(daily_sum numeric, monthly_sum numeric)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN
    RETURN QUERY
    SELECT 
        sum(
            CASE
                WHEN on_ramps."createdAt"::DATE = CURRENT_DATE THEN on_ramps.amount::numeric
                ELSE 0::numeric
            END) AS daily_sum,
        sum(on_ramps.amount::numeric) AS monthly_sum
    FROM on_ramps
    WHERE on_ramps.status = 'ON_CHAIN_COMPLETED'::on_ramps_status_enum 
    AND on_ramps."paymentMethodType" = 'ARS_BANK_TRANSFER'::on_ramps_paymentmethodtype_enum
    AND to_char(on_ramps."createdAt", 'YYYY-MM') = to_char(current_date, 'YYYY-MM')
    AND on_ramps.customer = customer_id
    GROUP BY on_ramps.customer;
END;

            "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_onramp_data_by_cpf_and_reference(p_from_currency character varying, p_tax_id character varying, p_from_amount character varying, p_status character varying, p_reference character varying)
 RETURNS jsonb[]
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    c_row jsonb;
    c_result jsonb[] := '{}';
    v_exists boolean;
BEGIN
    -- 🔍 Verificar si ya existe el reference
    SELECT TRUE INTO v_exists
    FROM on_ramps or2
    LEFT JOIN fiat_payment_instructions fpi ON or2."fiatPaymentInstructionsId" = fpi.id
    WHERE fpi.reference = p_reference
    LIMIT 1;

    -- 🚫 Si existe, retornar vacío inmediatamente
    IF v_exists THEN
        RETURN '{}';
    END IF;

    -- ✅ Continuar con la búsqueda normal
    FOR c_row IN
        SELECT jsonb_build_object(
                   'id', or2.id,
                   'status', or2."status",
                   'createdAt', or2."createdAt",
                   'customer', or2."customer",
                   'amountCrypto', q."fromAmount",
                   'amountFiat', q."toAmount",
                   'dni', REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(bc."taxId", ic.dni), '[^0-9]', '', 'g')
               )
        FROM on_ramps or2
        INNER JOIN quote q ON or2.quote = q.id
        LEFT JOIN business_customers bc ON bc."customerId" = or2.customer
        LEFT JOIN individual_customers ic ON ic."customerId" = or2.customer
        INNER JOIN customer c ON or2.customer = c.id
        WHERE q."fromCurrency"::TEXT = p_from_currency::TEXT
          AND REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(bc."taxId", ic.dni), '[^0-9]', '', 'g')::TEXT = p_tax_id::TEXT
          AND q."fromAmount"::TEXT = p_from_amount::TEXT
          AND or2."status"::TEXT = p_status::TEXT
          AND or2."PaymentGroupId" IS NULL
          AND or2."totalSend" = 0
          AND or2."createdAt" >= NOW() - INTERVAL '2 hours'
        ORDER BY or2."createdAt" ASC
    LOOP
        c_result := array_append(c_result, c_row);
    END LOOP;

    RETURN c_result;
END;

",
            "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_tx(p_id integer)
 RETURNS boolean
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
declare
    v_tx varchar;
    v_id_blockchain float;
    v_exist boolean = false;
	v_address varchar;
	v_amount integer = 0;
	v_fec varchar;

begin
	RAISE NOTICE 'Init whitdrawID: %',p_id;
	if (p_id is null) then 
		RAISE NOTICE 'Init whitdrawID is null: %',p_id;
		v_exist = false;
		return v_exist; 
	end if;
	/*
	* Process: Identificion de transacion alfredPay.
	* Descripcion: este proceso permite ubicar la transaccion con el fin
	* de validar si la mima se rechaza o no en tal caso de que no consiga merge con la tabla contract_event.
	*/
	SELECT bi.address, cast(w."createdAt" as timestamp) AS fec, t.amount
	INTO v_address, v_fec, v_amount
	FROM withdraw w
	JOIN transacction t ON w."transacctionId" = t.id
	JOIN invoice i ON t."invoiceId" = i.id
	JOIN business_interaction bi ON i."businessInteractionId" = bi.id
	WHERE w.id = p_id;

	RAISE NOTICE 'Transaction value v_address % v_fec % v_amount %', v_address, v_fec, v_amount;

	SELECT tx, id 
	INTO v_tx, v_id_blockchain 
	FROM contract_event 
	WHERE lower("from")=lower(v_address) 
	AND amount::numeric / 1000000000000000000 =v_amount
	AND "date" is not null
	AND cast("date" as timestamp) at time zone 'utc' >= v_fec
--	AND (extract(epoch from cast("date" as timestamp)) - extract(epoch from v_fec)) < 18000
	AND id not in (select id_blockchain from test_scripts) 
	AND NOT EXISTS (
	    SELECT 1
	    FROM transacction t
	    JOIN invoice i ON t."invoiceId" = i.id
	    JOIN business_interaction bi ON i."businessInteractionId" = bi.id
	    WHERE lower(bi.address) = lower('0xDbF06edaCbC14E6082105329893C71040E0A4e40')
	    AND tx = t."txHash"
--	    AND t."createdAt" >= '2024-04-11 22:38:21.000 -0400'
	)
	LIMIT 1;

	RAISE NOTICE 'Transaction txHash % v_id_blockchain %', v_tx, v_id_blockchain;
	if (v_tx is not null) then 

		v_exist = true;
		insert into test_scripts

            "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_tx_bk(p_id integer)
 RETURNS boolean
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
declare
    v_tx varchar;
    v_id_blockchain float;
    v_exist boolean = false;
	v_address varchar;
	v_amount float;
	v_fec TIMESTAMP;
    v_time_second numeric;

begin
	RAISE NOTICE 'Init whitdrawID: %',p_id;
	if (p_id is null) then 
		v_exist = false;
		return v_exist; 
	end if;
	/*
	* Process: Identificion de transacion alfredPay.
	* Descripcion: este proceso permite ubicar la transaccion con el fin
	* de validar si la mima se rechaza o no en tal caso de que no consiga merge con la tabla contract_event.
	*/
	SELECT bi.address, w."createdAt" AS fec, t.amount, extract(epoch from w."createdAt")
	INTO v_address, v_fec, v_amount, v_time_second
	FROM withdraw w
	JOIN transacction t ON w."transacctionId" = t.id
	JOIN invoice i ON t."invoiceId" = i.id
	JOIN business_interaction bi ON i."businessInteractionId" = bi.id
	WHERE w.id = p_id;

	RAISE NOTICE 'Transaction value v_address % v_fec % v_amount % second %', v_address, v_fec, v_amount, v_time_second;

	SELECT tx, id 
	INTO v_tx, v_id_blockchain 
	FROM contract_event 
	WHERE lower("from")=lower(v_address) 
	AND amount::float/1000000000000000000=v_amount
	AND "date" is not null
	AND cast("date" as timestamp) at time zone 'utc' >= v_fec
	AND (extract(epoch from cast("date" as timestamp) at time zone 'utc') - v_time_second) < 18600
	AND id not in (select id_blockchain from test_scripts) 
	AND tx NOT IN (
		SELECT t."txHash"
		FROM transacction t
		JOIN invoice i ON t."invoiceId" = i.id
		JOIN business_interaction bi ON i."businessInteractionId" = bi.id
		WHERE lower(bi.address) = lower(v_address)
		AND t."createdAt" >= v_fec
	)
	LIMIT 1;

	RAISE NOTICE 'Transaction txHash % v_id_blockchain %', v_tx, v_id_blockchain;
	if (v_tx is not null) then 

		v_exist = true;
		insert into test_scripts 
		(id, tx, id_blockchain, fecha) values(p_id, v_tx, v_id_blockchain, cast(v_fec as date)); 

		update transacction 
		set "txHash" = v_tx  where "withdrawId" = p_id;

		update withdraw 
		set "status" = 'PENDING'  where "id" = p_id;
		RAISE NOTICE 'whitdrawID: %',p_id;

	end if;

	return v_exist;

	EXCEPTION
        -- Captura de excepciones
        WHEN others THEN
            -- Manejo de la excepción
            RAISE NOTICE 'Error: %', SQLERRM;
    END;

$function$

            "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_webhook_queues()
 RETURNS TABLE(id uuid, "transactionId" uuid, "typeTransaction" character varying, status character varying, "statusTransaction" character varying, "eventData" json, metadata json, "createdAt" timestamp with time zone, "updatedAt" timestamp with time zone, attempts integer, reattempt_interval integer)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    reattempt_intervals INT[] := ARRAY[10 * 60000, 20 * 60000, 40 * 60000, 80 * 60000];
BEGIN
    RETURN QUERY
    SELECT
        "wq"."id",
        "wq"."transactionId",
        "wq"."typeTransaction",
        "wq"."status",
        "wq"."statusTransaction",
        "wq"."eventData",
        "wq"."metadata",
        "wq"."createdAt",
        "wq"."updatedAt",
        "wq"."attempts",
        reattempt_intervals[COALESCE("wq"."attempts", 1)]
    FROM
        "webhook_queue" "wq"
    WHERE
        "wq"."status" = 'FAILED'
        AND COALESCE("wq"."attempts", 1) < 5
        AND (extract(epoch from now()) * 1000 - extract(epoch from "wq"."updatedAt") * 1000) >= reattempt_intervals[COALESCE("wq"."attempts", 1)]
    LIMIT 100;
END;
$function$

            "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.insert_history_operation_liquidity(p_process character varying, p_id_transaction character varying, p_response jsonb, p_quote_buy numeric, p_quote_sell numeric)
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    v_revenue NUMERIC;
    v_side TEXT;
BEGIN

	-- Cálculo del revenue según el side
	    IF v_side = 'sell' THEN
	        -- Invertir el cálculo para evitar negativo
	       v_revenue := TRUNC(((p_quote_sell - p_quote_buy) / p_quote_buy) * 10000, 2);
	    ELSE
	        -- Caso buy (default)
	        v_revenue := TRUNC(((p_quote_buy - p_quote_sell) / p_quote_sell) * 10000, 2);
	    END IF;
			

    INSERT INTO history_operation_liquidity (
        process,
        idTransaction,
        response,
        revenue,
        created_at,
        updated_at
    )
    VALUES (
        p_process,
        p_id_transaction,
        p_response,
        v_revenue::VARCHAR,
        NOW(),
        NOW()
    );
END;

            "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.is_address_excluded(p_address character varying, p_chain character varying)
 RETURNS boolean
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    exists_record BOOLEAN;
BEGIN
    SELECT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM public.excluded_addresses ea
        WHERE ea.address = p_address
        AND (ea.chain = p_chain OR ea.chain IS NULL)
    )
    INTO exists_record;

    RETURN exists_record;
END;

",
            "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.registerpaymentwebhookqueuewld(p_data jsonb)
 RETURNS boolean
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE 
	v_valid_withdraw integer;
	v_statusWithdraw withdraw_status_enum;
BEGIN
	v_valid_withdraw := 0;
	v_statusWithdraw := p_data->>'statusWithdraw';

	RAISE NOTICE 'id %', p_data->>'withdrawId';

	BEGIN
		SELECT w.id 
		INTO v_valid_withdraw 
		FROM withdraw w 
		WHERE w.id = CAST(p_data->>'withdrawId' AS numeric)
		AND w.status = 'PENDING';
	EXCEPTION
		WHEN NO_DATA_FOUND THEN
			v_valid_withdraw := 0;
	END;

	IF v_valid_withdraw = 0 THEN 
		RETURN false;
	END IF;

	RAISE NOTICE 'eventData %', p_data->>'eventData';
	INSERT INTO public.webhook_queue_wld
	(
		id, 
		"withdrawId", 
		"typeTransaction", 
		"statusWithdraw", 
		"status",
		"eventData", 
		"metadata", 
		"proccess", 
		"createdAt", 
		"updatedAt",
		"eventOperation",
		"businessInterationId"
	)
	VALUES (
		uuid_generate_v4(),
		CAST(p_data->>'withdrawId' AS integer), 
		p_data->>'typeTransaction',
		p_data->>'statusWithdraw',
		p_data->>'status',
		(p_data->>'eventData')::json,
		(p_data->>'metadata')::json, 
		p_data->>'proccess',
		NOW(), 
		NOW(),
		p_data->>'eventOperation',
		null
	);

	UPDATE withdraw 
	SET status = v_statusWithdraw
	WHERE id = CAST(p_data->>'withdrawId' AS integer);

	RETURN true;
END;
$function$

            "CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.updateonrampbystatusandcurrency(p_action integer, p_status character varying, p_currency character varying)
 RETURNS jsonb[]
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE 
    c_paymentPending jsonb;
    c_result jsonb[] := '{}';
BEGIN
    FOR c_paymentPending IN 
        SELECT jsonb_build_object(
            'id', or2.id,
            'txHash', or2."txHash",
            'address', or2."depositAddress",
            'toAmount', q."toAmount",
            'chain', q."chain",
            'contador', or2."totalSend"
        )
	    FROM 
	       on_ramps or2 
	    INNER JOIN 
	        "quote" q ON or2."quote" = q.id
	    WHERE 
	        or2."fiatPaymentInstructionsId" % 2 = p_action
			AND or2.status = p_status::on_ramps_status_enum
			AND q."fromCurrency"::varchar = p_currency::varchar
			and or2."txHash" is not null
			and or2."totalSend" = 1
	    ORDER BY 
	     	or2."fiatPaymentInstructionsId" ASC
	    LIMIT 500
    LOOP
        c_result := array_append(c_result, c_paymentPending);
    END LOOP;
   
    RETURN c_result;
END;
